overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a futuristic urban downtown environment in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The camera moves along a concrete sidewalk past modern high-rise buildings and palm trees, with light vehicular traffic on a multi-lane road. The scene transitions from a straight path to a right turn revealing a large stadium structure and distinctive green-tinted futuristic towers under a partly cloudy sky.

concrete overpass structure spanning across the street above
tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
building with distinctive red and yellow signage visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a concrete sidewalk in a futuristic urban setting. A large dark office building dominates the right side while palm trees line the left. An elevated highway bridge spans overhead, and a colorful building is visible in the distance under a partly cloudy sky.

large circular stadium building with metallic exterior becoming visible

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking forward as a black sedan passes by on the street. The dark office building moves to the left as the camera passes it, while a large parking garage and stadium structure come into view ahead. The elevated highway bridge passes out of view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic plaza with stadium and green towers

pedestrian comes into view walking in the same direction ahead on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at the corner, transitioning to a wider view of the futuristic cityscape. A distinctive green-tinted tower rises on the right while the stadium structure is now prominent on the left. The camera follows a pedestrian walking ahead along the sidewalk, passing by a metal fence lining the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic urban corridor that transitions from a narrow street view into a wide, open cityscape. It begins by walking along a concrete sidewalk beneath an elevated highway bridge, flanked by a towering dark office building and a line of palm trees. As the camera moves forward and a black sedan passes on the street, the office building recedes to the left and the highway bridge disappears overhead, revealing a large parking garage and stadium structure ahead. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right at the corner, opening up to a broader vista where a prominent green-tinted tower rises on the right and the stadium dominates the left. Finally, the perspective follows a pedestrian along a sidewalk lined by a metal fence, moving deeper into the expansive futuristic environment under a partly cloudy sky.
